tasks.label: Parar Sonar Dashboard
tasks.command: $procs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*vite*' -and $_.CommandLine -like '*sonar-dashboard*' }; if ($procs) { $procs | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force }; Write-Host ('Sonar Dashboard parado (' + @($procs).Count + ' proceso(s) terminado(s)).') -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host 'No hay proceso Vite de sonar-dashboard corriendo.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }
